landing.title: Book a meeting in minutes
landing.subtitle: Pick the meeting type, time, and leave your contact — share the link with a friend or colleague.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Book your slot in under 2 minutes.

features.title: Fast booking
features.description: Intuitive flow — pick duration, location, and time in a few steps.

features.title: Your timezone
features.description: Slots displayed automatically in your local timezone.

features.title: Secure
features.description: Cloudflare Turnstile verification and email confirmation.

features.title: Flexible meetings
features.description: Online, phone, or in-person — you choose.

features.title: Admin confirmation
features.description: Every booking is reviewed before final confirmation.

features.title: Reminders
features.description: Automatic emails 24h and 1h before your meeting.

faq.question: Is my booking confirmed immediately?
faq.answer: No — you'll receive an email that your request was received. Final confirmation comes after admin approval.

faq.question: Can I cancel my booking?
faq.answer: Yes, while the status is pending. After admin confirmation, please contact the host directly.

faq.question: What data do you collect?
faq.answer: Name, email, optional phone and notes — solely for scheduling your meeting.

faq.question: Can I choose the language?
faq.answer: Yes — the app supports Polish and English.

booking.stepMeetingType: What kind of meeting is this?
booking.meetingTypeSocialDesc: Informal meeting without a business agenda
booking.stepDuration: How long should the meeting be?
booking.stepLocation: How would you like to meet?

booking.customMeetingPlaceHint_online: Optional — share your preferred way to meet online.
booking.customMeetingPlaceHint_phone: Optional — e.g. your preferred calling app.
booking.customMeetingPlaceHint_in_person: Enter a specific place — cafe name, address, or landmark.
booking.summaryEmpty: Your choices will appear here as you go.
booking.locationOnlineInfo: We'll send you a meeting link after your booking is confirmed.
booking.locationPhoneInfo: We'll call you at the number you provide at the scheduled time.
booking.noSlots: No available slots on this day
booking.noSlotsAvailable: No available slots in the near future
booking.pickDateFirst: Pick a day on the calendar to see available times
booking.name: Full name
booking.successMessage: Thank you! Your meeting request has been received. You'll get an email when the admin confirms your booking.
booking.successSubtext: Check your inbox — we sent a confirmation that we received your request.
booking.turnstileRequired: Please verify you're not a robot

bookingStatus.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking?
bookingStatus.cannotCancel: This booking can no longer be cancelled

admin.deleteDurationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this meeting duration?
admin.durationInUse: Cannot delete — this duration is used in existing bookings.
admin.durationLast: At least one meeting duration must remain.

intake.title: Intake questions
intake.description: Configure additional questions in the booking form.
intake.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this question?

email.requestReceivedBody: Your meeting request has been received and is awaiting confirmation.
email.confirmedBody: Your booking has been confirmed. See you soon!

legal.privacyIntro: MeetMe processes personal data solely for meeting scheduling in compliance with GDPR.
legal.dataCollectedBody: Full name, email address, phone number (optional), and meeting notes.
legal.dataUsageBody: We use your data to organize meetings, send email notifications, and manage the calendar.
legal.contactBody: For data protection inquiries, contact the administrator at the email listed in the admin panel.
legal.termsIntro: By using MeetMe, you accept the following booking terms.
legal.bookingPolicyBody: Meeting requests require admin confirmation. Until confirmed, bookings remain in pending status.
legal.cancellationBody: Users may cancel bookings independently while status is pending. After admin confirmation, contact the host directly.
